_schema.handle: internal slug (lowercase, may differ from Farcaster username)
_schema.fid: Farcaster FID number - PRIMARY identity. If set, HAATZ avatar lookup uses bulk?fids=X (always reliable). If null, falls back to parsing farcaster_url for username.
_schema.name: Display name
_schema.roles: Array of: organizer | mentor | workshop_lead | core_builder | sponsor | partner | builder
_schema.headline: One-line credential or position
_schema.expertise_label: Single-word label for card (e.g. ECOSYSTEM, MUSIC TECH, CONTRACTS, RETENTION)
_schema.session_count: for workshop_lead: how many sessions confirmed
_schema.session_topics: for workshop_lead: array of confirmed topics
_schema.what_they_offer: For mentor: what builders get pairing with them
_schema.best_fit_for: For mentor: what type of build is best fit

people.name: Zaal Panthaki
people.headline: Organizer + BetterCallZaal + The ZAO operations
people.bio: Engineer, builder, and connector in the web3/Farcaster/music ecosystem. Runs BetterCallZaal Strategies LLC, hosts COC Concertz, organizes ZABAL Gamez. BS Electrical Engineering, RIT 2022. Maine-based.
people.what_they_offer: Direct line into the ZAO ecosystem - intros, context, pattern matching against past builds, infra access.
people.best_fit_for: Builds that touch multiple ZAO surfaces (music + governance + agents + Farcaster). Generalists who need cross-domain connective tissue.

people.name: Tyler Stambaugh
people.headline: Founder, Magnetiq - workshop library platform
people.bio: Founder of Magnetiq, the workshop library + entry/onboarding platform hosting every ZABAL Gamez Season 1 session. Magnetiq is the host platform for the workshop month - native video, opt-in email capture, per-vendor watch analytics.
session_topics: Magnetiq - The Workshop Library Behind ZABAL Gamez

people.name: Thy Revolution
people.headline: Indie music + creator-tools workshop lead
people.bio: Workshop lead #002 - confirmed 2 sessions for June 2026 (topics TBD). Also known as Mickey or Rev (three names, same person). Years building independently outside the major-label system.
session_topics: TBD - session 1 of 2
TBD - session 2 of 2

people.name: Hurric4n3Ike
people.headline: WaveWarZ founder - Solana music battle markets
people.bio: Built WaveWarZ on Solana - the artist prediction-market platform. Growing battle history + cumulative SOL volume (live numbers at wavewarz-intelligence.vercel.app). WaveWarZ is the underlying tech the August Finals will run on.

people.name: Sam
people.headline: WaveWarZ-Base co-builder
people.bio: Shipping the Base agentic version of WaveWarZ alongside Hurric4n3Ike. Two smart contracts on testnet, mainnet-bound for July. Full handle + surname pending confirmation.

people.name: Will T of Web3
people.headline: Building KFMEDIA℠
people.bio: Workshop lead for ZABAL Gamez Season 1, building KFMEDIA℠. Refer to him as Will T of Web3. KFMEDIA℠ community: @kingfishersmedia on Farcaster, @kmllcw3 on X.
session_topics: Building KFMEDIA℠ - what he is building, how he is doing it, and the lessons so far.

people.name: Joseph Goats
people.headline: Independent musician - Digital Street Music
people.bio: Independent musician exploring Digital Street Music: live performance on the streets of the metaverse, in service of social impact and coordination. He learned English working in DAOs and built an independent, blockchain-agnostic practice, connecting roots to the decentralized social layer of the new internet and inviting other musicians and artists to do the same.
session_topics: Owning your music as an independent artist - releasing, owning your masters and your audience, and turning listeners into a community that pays you directly.

people.name: yerbearserker
people.headline: Empire Builder co-founder
people.bio: Jordan Oram, co-founder of Empire Builder, the leaderboard and Empire platform $ZABAL is built on. Led the Day 1 ZABAL Gamez workshop on Empire Builder V3 and stood up a tokenless ZABAL Gamez Empire live during the session.
session_topics: Empire Builder V3 - leaderboards, Empires, and token mechanics

people.name: Joshua.eth
people.headline: Bonfire founder
people.bio: Founder of Bonfire, the shared knowledge graph used as the ZABAL Gamez shared memory. Co-led the Day 1 workshop on Bonfire and the ZABAL Bonfire bot.
session_topics: Bonfire and the ZABAL Bonfire bot

people.name: Plat0x
people.headline: Bonfire technical architect
people.bio: Developer at Bonfire, based in Ecuador. Co-led the Day 1 Bonfire workshop and the Day 6 fireside on planning, types-first builds, and documentation as code.
session_topics: Going deeper on the ZABAL Bonfire and building on the graph

people.name: Adrian
people.headline: Empire Builder co-founder and lead engineer
people.bio: Co-creator and lead engineer of Empire Builder. A self-taught developer and technical writer who built early Farcaster traction through Frames.
session_topics: Empire Builder API workshop - V3 endpoints plus the leaderboard

people.name: Jonathan Colton
people.headline: FounderCheck builder, Fotocaster co-creator
people.bio: Builder behind FounderCheck, a tool for pressure-testing an idea before you build it, and co-creator of Fotocaster, a photo platform built so artists keep almost all of every sale. Former strategy consultant.
session_topics: FounderCheck - founder validation
Propagating your work on Farcaster as a developer

people.name: kmac.eth
people.headline: Farcaster Snaps builder
people.bio: A Farcaster Snaps specialist and co-creator of Zlank, with deep Farcaster signer expertise. Leading a ZABAL Gamez session on building and shipping interactive Snaps.
session_topics: Farcaster Snaps - building and shipping interactive Snaps

people.name: Cassie
people.headline: Quilibrium builder
people.bio: A builder at Quilibrium who re-engineered audio Spaces for the Quorum Farcaster client. Her ZABAL Gamez session is a live build-along on the Farcaster protocol (currently being rescheduled).
session_topics: The Farcaster protocol, ins and outs - a live build-along

people.name: Duo Do
people.headline: Musician duo on Farcaster
people.bio: A musician duo, Clementine and Santiago, active on Farcaster and on the road to Farcon. They perform as Duo Do and have played ZAO shows including COC Concertz.
session_topics: Musician on Farcaster, and the road to Farcon

people.name: Ohnahji
people.headline: Live streamer, founder of the Ohnahji community
people.bio: Founder of the Ohnahji community, a safe space for Black, brown, and allied folks learning emerging tech. Co-hosts the Web3 Podcast and is deep into a 365-day daily live-stream run. Opened the ZABAL Gamez creator track.
session_topics: Starting and growing your own livestream

people.name: Chris (chriscocreated)
people.headline: Founder of Sopha
people.bio: Founder of Sopha, a Farcaster client built for depth and high signal - an intentional third place for the deeper writing and art that scrolls past the main feed, with a community-curated feed. Led a ZABAL Gamez workshop on building Sopha and why curation is needed.
session_topics: Building Sopha, and why curation is needed

people.name: Adam Miller
people.headline: MIDAO + Beta Briefing
people.bio: Founder and CEO of MIDAO, which created the Marshall Islands legal framework that lets a DAO - or now a decentralized AI agent - become a real legal entity (a DAO LLC). Also builds Beta Briefing, an agentic daily news tool. Find him on Farcaster as The Thriller and on X as 0xThriller.
session_topics: Talking miDAO - legal structures for DAOs and AI agents - plus Beta Briefing

people.name: Ali Tiknazoglu
people.headline: Vibecoding builder
people.bio: Builds with AI tooling and shares what he learns. His ZABAL Gamez session, Previbecoding, is about getting more out of AI tools when you are learning to code - setting up context, where AI still falls down, and what to do on day one.
session_topics: Previbecoding - learning to code with AI tooling

people.name: Aziz (MotoMoto)
people.headline: Building Baraza Protocol (BAD DAO)
people.bio: Builder at BAD DAO. Built Baraza Protocol - a phone-first treasury for chamas and SACCOs - with zero coding background, by directing AI tools. Part of BAD DAO's four-product loop. His ZABAL Gamez session, Non-Dev to Shipped, shows the exact method.
session_topics: Non-Dev to Shipped - building Baraza Protocol by directing AI tools

people.name: Dan Singjoy
people.headline: Eden Fractal + the fractal ecosystem
people.bio: Part of the Eden Fractal and Optimystics orbit. His ZABAL Gamez session covers Eden Fractal, the wider fractal ecosystem, the history of fractal communities, and how it connects to ZAO Fractal.
session_topics: Eden Fractal and the fractal ecosystem

people.name: Chris Dolinsky
people.headline: Building Vini App
people.bio: Builder of Vini App, a Farcaster mini app (presented at Farcaster Batches Day 1). His ZABAL Gamez session is a look at what he is building and how the community can try it.
session_topics: Vini App - what he is building, for the community to try

people.name: Kenny
people.headline: POIDH - bounties on Farcaster
people.bio: Built POIDH (pics or it didn't happen), a bounty platform on Farcaster. His ZABAL Gamez session covers POIDH and how to use it, plus wrapping the Best ZABAL Gamez Ad bounty and launching the next one.
session_topics: Talking POIDH - bounties on Farcaster, plus the ZABAL ad bounty

people.name: Dr. Jake
people.headline: Growth through foundations
people.bio: ZABAL Gamez creator-track lead. His session is on growth through foundations - building the base that real growth stands on.
session_topics: Growth through foundations

people.name: Adrienne
people.headline: GM Farcaster, building Warpee.eth
people.bio: Of GM Farcaster. Her ZABAL Gamez session is on building Warpee.eth, an AI agent for a media company on Farcaster.
session_topics: Building Warpee.eth, an AI agent for a media company on Farcaster

people.name: Jub Jub
people.headline: Farcaster Batches, GM Farcaster
people.bio: Organizer of Farcaster Batches, the week-long GM Farcaster builder showcase. His ZABAL Gamez fireside is a conversation about Farcaster Batches and the people of Farcaster.
session_topics: Farcaster Batches and the people of Farcaster

people.name: Meta Mu
people.headline: Founder of Rose City Web3
people.bio: Founder of Rose City Web3 and an artist-first builder in Portland. His ZABAL Gamez session is on how to be a community member who adds real value - finding the live rooms, showing up, and making the first connection.
session_topics: Adding value as a community member

people.name: Minted Merch
people.headline: Selling merch onchain
people.bio: Builder of Minted Merch. His ZABAL Gamez session covers selling merch onchain and what it opens up for creators.
session_topics: Selling merch onchain

people.name: The Farcaster Intern
people.headline: The Farcaster Intern
people.bio: The Farcaster Intern joined ZABAL Gamez for an open-mic audio-space AMA hosted by BetterCallZaal - an open conversation on Farcaster, how it works, building on it, and where it is headed.
session_topics: AMA on the future of Farcaster

people.name: Saltorious
people.headline: Builder of Harness, now at Bankr
people.bio: Builder of Harness, the tool he made, and now part of the Bankr team. His ZABAL Gamez session covers what they are and how they fit into building today.
session_topics: Harness and Bankr

people.name: Dylan Yarter
people.headline: BizarreBeasts - Bizarre Pixel Studio
people.bio: Creator of BizarreBeasts and the Bizarre Pixel Studio - a browser-based pixel art and animation tool where your artwork is also editable code. His ZABAL Gamez session walks through the studio, the miniapp, the games, and the artwork.
session_topics: Building the Bizarre Pixel Studio

people.name: topocount
people.headline: Snapchain - Neynar
people.bio: Builder at Neynar working on Snapchain. His ZABAL Gamez session goes under the hood - how Snapchain signers work, OG vs Snapchain-native signers, storage, and future work.
session_topics: Snapchain under the hood
